reviews.review_description: This is a fun little game with a lot of potential. It still needs a bit of polish, but i was happy to buy this game and support the developer as this brought back a lot of nostalgia for me. Keep up the good work!

reviews.review_title: This seems very early in development
reviews.review_description: This game has a lot of potential if the little bugs are works out here and there.

reviews.review_title: Who can argue with a rampart game?
reviews.review_description: Loved rampart as a kid and I am glad to see it still is recognized. Hope for multiplayer one day!

reviews.review_title: Great Game for both Single & Multiplayer
reviews.review_description:
Really enjoyable game. The single player mode is great with quite a few maps to play. The Tetris elements are really good and scratch that Tetris itch quite well.

PvP is super fun as well, it gets really intense. Highly recommend.

reviews.review_title: Found a retro hidden gem, <3 this VR ver
reviews.review_description: I didn't know about Rampart until I found Ramcastle. I'm a little addicted now :P
